topic: What is Echolocation and why does it matter for your business?
tone: Conversational, plain English, no jargon, results-focused
hook: If you don't fix great at the job, terrible at marketing this month, next quarter is already compromised.

structure.opening: Acknowledge the specific reality this avatar lives in — use their vocabulary, not yours.
structure.value: Name the cost of What is Echolocation and why does it matter for your business? in terms this avatar tracks (time, money, or reputation).
structure.evidence: Show proof in the format they trust: Photos, dollar amounts, booked calendar screenshots.
structure.system: Present the fix as a repeatable system, not a one-off tactic.
structure.cta: Free 'lead response scorecard' — how fast are you really responding?

optimization_notes: Lead with a dollar amount — this avatar responds to financial framing.
Include a before/after or visual comparison — this avatar's top performers all had them.
Attach a screenshot as proof — raw evidence beats explanation.
Keep it tight — this avatar's dwell time drops fast on long content.
Use vocabulary the avatar recognizes: Jobs, leads, calls, reviews, schedule, booked, crew, trucks
proof_type: Photos, dollar amounts, booked calendar screenshots
